CREATE TABLE urls (url_id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO urls (url_id, url) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com');
INSERT INTO urls (url_id, url) VALUES (2, 'https://example.org');
INSERT INTO urls (url_id, url) VALUES (3, 'ftp://example.net');
INSERT INTO urls (url_id, url) VALUES (4, 'http://sample.com/robots.txt');
SELECT sys.getroboturl(url) FROM urls WHERE url_id = 1;
SELECT sys.getroboturl(url) FROM urls WHERE url_id IN (SELECT url_id FROM urls WHERE url_id < 4);
SELECT sys.getroboturl(url) AS robot_url FROM urls WHERE LENGTH(url) > 20;
CREATE TABLE robots (robot_id INT PRIMARY KEY, robot_url CLOB);
INSERT INTO robots (robot_id, robot_url) VALUES (1, sys.getroboturl('http://example.com'));
INSERT INTO robots (robot_id, robot_url) VALUES (2, sys.getroboturl('https://example.org'));
INSERT INTO robots (robot_id, robot_url) VALUES (3, sys.getroboturl('ftp://example.net'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM robots WHERE robot_url IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM robots) AS total_robots, sys.getroboturl((SELECT url FROM urls LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)) AS robot_url;
CREATE TABLE detailed_urls (url_id INT, url VARCHAR(255), category VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO detailed_urls (url_id, url, category) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com', 'example');
INSERT INTO detailed_urls (url_id, url, category) VALUES (2, 'https://example.org', 'example');
INSERT INTO detailed_urls (url_id, url, category) VALUES (3, 'ftp://example.net', 'ftp');
SELECT d.category, sys.getroboturl(d.url) FROM detailed_urls d WHERE d.category = 'example';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM detailed_urls) AS total_urls, sys.getroboturl((SELECT url FROM detailed_urls WHERE category = 'ftp' LIMIT 1));
